'''Myrette "Rette" Davani''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], the daughter of [[Nils Davani|Nils]] and [[Haryette Davani|Haryette]].

==Biography==
Davani was born on [[Beheboth]] to a veteran of the Clone Wars.<ref name="EGWCut10" /> She enrolled in the [[Coruscani Pilot Institute]] training to become a [[TIE pilot]], and became best friends with her classmate [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] she left CPI, second in her class behind Shira, and they transferred to the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] for their final year, where they remained bunkmates and close friends.<ref name="Heavy Duty" />

In one training battle with [[Mountain Terrain Scout Transport|MT-STs]], Brie's vehicle was armed with fully-operational weapons, which killed a dozen enemy cadets. Horrified, Davani informed her parents. Unbeknownst to her, Brie had been selected by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] for training in the dark side of the force.

Davani graduated salutatorian from the [[Naval Academy]] and served with the 722nd "Copperheads" and served in flight ops on the ''[[Attaintor]]''. She attained the rank of [[Flight Captain]] and flew as [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel's]] wingman in the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]].<ref name="EGWCut10" />
